titleStmt.title: SII 10.343: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 343. (A.R. No. 231 of 1905.) ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME ROOM. Ś. 1176. (Ānanda)

summary.p: States that Nāmadēva-Paṇḍita, the agent of Gaṇḍapeṇḍāru Gaṅgayya-Sāhiṇi, a dependent of Kākatīya Gaṇapatidēva, made a gift of the village of [K]eṅkulakuṇṭa and 40 cows to the temple of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ kākatiyyagaṇapatidēvamahā rājulu Ōrugallu nijarājadhānigānu sukhasaṁkhathāvinōdaṁbula rājyaṁbu
sēyucuṁḍagānu tatpādapadmārādhakuṁ ḍaIna svasti yanēka nāmāvaḷi virājamāna mānōṁnnata Ativiśamahayārūḍhaprauḍharēkhārēvaṁta vijayalakṣmīkāṁta dasadigu bharitakī¨rttikāmanīvallabha
bhayalōbhadu¨rllabha paścimarāyadāmōdarasainyadiśāpaṭṭa vairigharaṭṭa rakkasagaṁgarana diśāpaṭṭa mū¨rkharāyajagaddaḷa gaṇapatidēvadivyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka parabaḷasādhaka nāmādisamastaprasa
stisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷika Arivīrabrahmarākṣasanāyakanārāyaṇa gaṁḍapeṁḍāru gaṁgayya sāhiṇi samastarājyasamuddharuṁ ḍaina svasti samastarājyabhāranirūpita mahāmātyapadavīrājamā
namānōṁnnata prabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayaguṇasaṁpaṁnna Ānayāsanadvaidhībhāvaśā ḍguṇyaguṇōpēta parēṁgitajñāna Aṣṭāvadhāraṇādhau¨ryya bharitaUtpaṁnnamatisaṁpaṁnna sura gurusamāna sakaḷaśāstrapā
rāvāraka maṁtrimāṇikya nīticāṇākya patikā¨ryyadhuraṁdhara parivārakalpalatāpūjya dīnā¨rttijanasuva¨rnnadhārānaṭanagabhīrayu dīpānāṁthagāyakavaitāḷikavaibhā sikadaṁḍimuṁḍisikhaṁ
ḍi nānāpēkṣaśōḍaśaĀcakadaridrakhaṁḍana nityanēmānuṣṭāna vāśiṣṭapurōgamanu laina nāma dēvapaṁḍitulu svasti śrīsakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1176 Eṁṭi Ānaṁdasaṁvatsaramuna caitra śu 15 śu . nāḍu deva
napa¨rvvanimityamuna śrītripurāṁtaka śrīmanumahādēvaraku duvva ṁpanalōni keṁkulakuṁṭa catussīmamūnu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu nicce . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi ¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . Ānimityamunanē śrītripurāṁtakadēvaraku Akhaṁḍadīpamunaku nāmadēvani Icina modavulu 40 vīniṁ
jēkoni bāliseṭṭi bālama nitya māneṁḍu nētilekhanu tanavaṁśānuparaṁpara naḍapuvāru .
Digital edition of SII 10.343 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
